domains.name: Agent Architecture and Design
domains.focus: Foundational structuring and design of agentic AI systems, including how agents interact, reason, and communicate.

domains.name: Agent Development
domains.focus: Practical building, integration, tool use, structured outputs, orchestration frameworks, and reliability patterns.

domains.name: Evaluation and Tuning
domains.focus: Measuring, comparing, and optimizing agent performance across answers, trajectories, tool calls, latency, cost, and safety.

domains.name: Deployment and Scaling
domains.focus: Operationalizing and scaling agentic systems with services, queues, rollouts, reliability, and fallback patterns.

domains.name: Cognition, Planning, and Memory
domains.focus: Reasoning strategies, planning, task decomposition, short-term memory, long-term memory, and reflection.

domains.name: Knowledge Integration and Data Handling
domains.focus: External knowledge, retrieval pipelines, vector search, structured data, access control, freshness, and grounding.

domains.name: NVIDIA Platform Implementation
domains.focus: NIM, NeMo Agent Toolkit, NeMo Guardrails, NeMo Retriever, Nemotron, Triton, and TensorRT-LLM for agentic systems.

domains.name: Run, Monitor, and Maintain
domains.focus: Ongoing operation, tracing, tool-call monitoring, drift detection, cost dashboards, and incident response.

domains.name: Safety, Ethics, and Compliance
domains.focus: Prompt injection defense, tool security, guardrails, privacy, auditability, responsible AI, and compliance.

domains.name: Human-AI Interaction and Oversight
domains.focus: Human-in-the-loop approvals, escalation, UI feedback, review queues, and human-on-the-loop monitoring.
